item.title: fried_egg_golf: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 7min Ryan Gerard didn't have the Sunday he was hoping for to wrap up his Masters debut,
item.description:
Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 7min Ryan Gerard didn't have the Sunday he was hoping for to wrap up his Masters debut, but there were plenty of positives to take out of the tournament.
As he made his way to Hilton Head, Gerard spoke with @JosephLaMagna to reflect on his week at Augusta National. 1 1 2 1 mil

item.title: fried_egg_golf: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 6min En respuesta a @fried_egg_golf Read "Ryan Gerard's First Masters: Episode V" here
item.description:

item.title: ANTIFAldo: No Laying Up reposteó ANTIFAldo @ANTIFAldo · 28min Rory during his next presser: No se pudo reproducir el contenido mult
item.description: No Laying Up reposteó ANTIFAldo @ANTIFAldo · 28min Rory during his next presser: No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar 3 48 7 mil
